checklist.entry: Prefer Cloudflare's Vitest integration for unit and integration tests in the Workers runtime.
Use unstable_startWorker or Miniflare only where their documented capabilities fit the required test type.
Record whether tests used Workers runtime execution, local simulation or deployed resources.
Do not claim deployed binding validation from mocked local bindings alone.
Use Workers Logs, real-time logs, Tail Workers or Logpush according to the required troubleshooting and retention model.
Keep log sampling and retention explicit when making observability claims.
Avoid logging secrets, tokens, personal data or unnecessary request bodies.
Account for log size limits and truncation risk.
Enable upload_source_maps where production stack trace readability matters.
Do not expect source maps to be available inside the Worker at runtime.
Treat source maps as deployment and observability configuration, not application logic.
